patterns.name: Extract Method
patterns.description: Methods extracted from monolithic modules into dedicated files in the same directory. Classic decomposition pattern: one large file sheds responsibilities into focused modules.

patterns.name: Test Coverage Expansion
patterns.description: 7 new test files added. Test-first or test-alongside development — covering new code as it ships.

patterns.name: Dead Code Removal
patterns.description: 1750 files deleted — unused code eliminated. Reduces maintenance burden, removes misleading signals for new readers.

patterns.name: Stability Sprint
patterns.description: Focus on removal and fixing over feature addition. Technical debt being paid down — a sign of mature development practice.
